response.justification: Candidate meets core technical requirements with 16+ years of software engineering and recent direct work on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the profile lacks demonstrated strategic AI expertise, shipped AI-powered products, and enterprise advisory experience that the principal-level AI strategy role expects. The current AI infrastructure work is promising but recent, and the resume shows strong execution skills without clear evidence of the strategic influence and recognized AI expertise preferred for this director-level position.
strengths: Currently building AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) at re:cinq—directly aligned with the role's focus
Full-stack technical depth across web, mobile, backend, DevOps, and cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) with proven ability to build and scale platforms
16+ years of software engineering with demonstrated execution from freelance through staff-level roles
concerns: No demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms shipped; current AI work appears recent (2025) without a track record of recognized AI expertise
Resume emphasizes technical execution over strategic leadership—limited evidence of customer advisory, enterprise influence, or thought leadership on cloud/AI adoption
Missing preferred advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field; educational foundation is general CS rather than AI-specialized

key_factors.factor: Current AI infrastructure work (MCP, agent frameworks)
Lack of demonstrated AI products or platforms
Limited evidence of strategic/advisory experience at scale
